name: GTN Textiles Limited
summary: GTN Textiles Limited engages in the manufacture and sale of combed cotton yarn in India. It operates through, Yarn and Realty segments. The company's product includes compact, ring spun, siro compact, and slub yarns, as well as knitted fabrics. It is also involved in real estate business. The company also export its products. GTN Textiles Limited was incorporated in 2005 and is headquartered in Kochi, India.
